infoAgain: Would you like to try to beat your score?
optTerms: By opting in, you are accepting the T&Cs
noteEndSoon: The tournament is about to end. Don't miss out, it's your last chance for an awesome reward!
noteStart: The tournament begins now. Climb the leaderboard and collect your rewards. Good luck!
noteEnd: The tournament has now ended. Check your results.
noteBet: Your bet is below the qualifying amount of {value}.
terms.uniqueAlias: A unique alias will be assigned to each Player’s account and displayed for the Players on the Leaderboard.
terms.allDevicesTerms: Gameplay from all devices during the Campaign Rounds will be counted towards the Player’s score. {RULES}
terms.hotSpots: This tournament has Hot Spots which can award additional prizes to winners.
terms.prizesInOverview: The prizes are displayed on the Leaderboard in the Player’s local currency. The prize amounts are exchanged from Euro to the Player’s local currency by using fixed conversion rates. The conversion rate is determined by Relax and is guided by the average annual exchange rates and reviewed on a monthly basis.
terms.partialAutomaticFulfillment: The following prizes will be automatically awarded once the Campaign ends: {PRIZES}
terms.manualFulfillment: The prizes will be manually awarded by the organiser of the promotion.
terms.automaticFulfillment: The prizes will be automatically awarded once the campaign ends.
terms.partialManualFulfillment: The following prizes will be manually awarded by the Organiser: {PRIZES}
terms.prizeWageringRequirement: Potential wagering requirements for Relax Gaming cash drops and Relax Gaming tournament prizes are handled by the operator depending on jurisdictional requirements
terms.participationTerms: The participation in the Campaign is free, but the Player is required to opt-in to the Campaign in one of the Qualifying Games.
terms.acceptanceOfTerms: By opting into the Campaign, the player agrees to be bound by these terms and conditions.
terms.tournamentTime: The campaign (“Campaign”) is organised by Relax Gaming Group and runs between {startdatetime} UTC and {enddatetime} UTC. The online gaming operator operating this website will be referred to as the “Operator” in these Campaign Rules. The Qualifying Games in the Campaign (as defined below) are developed and/or licensed to the Operator by Relax.
terms.gameplayTimeframe: Only gameplay during the Campaign Rounds will be considered for calculating the Player’s score. Points are not awarded for gameplay prior to the opt-in and points will not be awarded retroactively. Gameplay from all devices during the Campaign Rounds will be counted towards the Player’s score. {RULES}
terms.participatingGames: The games qualifying for this campaign are: {GAMES}
terms.balanceEligibility: Only wagers placed with real balances or bonus balances are taken into account for the purposes of calculating the Player’s score.
terms.technicalIssuesContingency: In case of disconnection or technical issues, all affected rounds may be rendered void and may not be included in the Campaign Rounds for the purposes of determining the Player’s score and triggering reward.
terms.minBetSet: The minimum bet to participate in the Campaign is {minbet}, or the closest rounded value if such bet size is not configured for the applicable Qualifying Game, or equivalent in the Player's local currency.
terms.noMinBetSet: There is no minimum bet required for the Player to be able to opt-in.
terms.operatorGeneralTerms: The Operator's general terms and conditions apply. In the event of any discrepancy between these Campaign Rules and the Operator’s general terms and conditions, these Campaign Rules prevail.
terms.englishTermPresedence: In the event of a discrepancy between the English version of these Campaign Rules and any other language, the English version prevails.
terms.rightToCancel: The Organiser reserves the right to update these Campaign Rules at any time. The operator reserves the right to cancel the campaign at any point.
terms.rightToVoid: The Organiser reserves the right to forfeit the prizes of Players who are deemed to i) be abusing these Campaign Rules; ii) be using any online or offline tool or service (including artificial intelligence, “bots” and other computer programs and software) which is used to execute or assist in the execution of any action relating to the Campaign and is designed to provide an unfair advantage to the Player; or iii) as considered in the Organiser’s sole discretion, in any other manner intentionally or unintentionally, be gaining an unfair advantage over the other Players taking part in the Campaign. Where Relax Gaming does not act as the Organiser of the Campaign, it has nevertheless the right to do the same.
terms.cheaterForfeiture: Players who cheat will have their entry voided and any prizes won forfeited.
terms.leaderboardRefreshTime: The Leaderboard displays the current score and position of the Players participating in the Campaign. A unique alias will be assigned to each Player’s account and displayed for the Players on the Leaderboard. The Players’ score and position on the Leaderboard will be updated every 10 seconds.
terms.operatorResponsibility: The operator and the website on which the player's account is held are the sole responsible entities to ensure that the promotion complies with local laws and the terms of the promotion, including any changes thereof, shall be communicated in a timely and transparent manner.
terms.tiebreakerTerm: Tied scores are resolved in favour of the Player who achieved the score first.
terms.highestScoreGoal:
The aim of the Campaign is to score as many points as possible. 
“Highest Score” – the Player with highest points score at the end of the Campaign Period is placed on the top of the Leaderboard.
terms.freeRoundExemptions: Free Rounds, Feature Triggers and Bonus Rounds (including bonus buys or feature buys or any other such features) will not be considered as separate rounds for the purposes of calculating the Player’s score and are considered part of the original round.
terms.freeRoundExemptionsSeparateSpin: Free Rounds, Feature Triggers, and Bonus Rounds will not be considered a separate spin for the purposes of any criteria
terms.jackpotWinExemptions: Any jackpot wins during the Campaign Rounds are excluded for the purposes of calculating the Player’s score.
terms.pointsPriorToOptIn: Points are not awarded for gameplay prior to opt-in, and points will not be awarded retroactively.
terms.lastUpdated: These Campaign Rules were last updated on {timestamp}
terms.gameRTP: The RTP of the Qualifying Games is not influenced by this Campaign.
terms.Hot Spots: This Campaign has Hot Spots which can award additional prizes to winning Players.
terms.bestOfGoal: The aim of the Campaign is to score as many points as possible. “Best Of” - The Players aim to get the highest points score in a fixed number of rounds. The Players may attempt to improve their score an unlimited number of times during the Campaign Period.
terms.bonusbuy: Bonus buy feature does not count towards the tournament leader-board score.
terms.localTournamentTime: The campaign (“Campaign”) is organised by the Operator and runs between {startdatetime} UTC and {enddatetime} UTC. The online gaming operator operating this website will be referred to as the “Operator” in these Campaign Rules. The Qualifying Games in the Campaign (as defined below) are developed and/or licensed to the Operator by Relax.
terms.localRightToCancel: The Operator reserves the right to update these Campaign Rules at any time. The operator reserves the right to cancel the campaign at any point.
rule.pointsPerSpinWonInARow: {points} points per {winsInARow} spins won in a row
rule.pointsPerSpinLostInARow: {points} points per {lossesInARow} spins lost in a row
rule.winBetRatio: Points are awarded based on your win ratio, e.g. if you wager a total of €50 and win €60, you would receive 1.2 points
rule.highestSingleScore: Points are awarded based on your highest single win, relative to the amount you bet during the course of the tournament. If your new score is higher than your previous score, the highest score will be used for ranking e.g. if you bet €1 and win €20, you would receive 20 points.
rule.pointsPerWinAboveMinimumNotInclusiv: On a minimum win higher than {limit} bet multiplier, you’ll be awarded {points} points.
rule.pointsPerWinAboveMinimumInclusive: On a minimum win higher than or equal to {limit} bet multiplier, you’ll be awarded {points} points.
rule.pointsPerWinBetweenRangeInclusive: On a minimum win higher than or equal to {limit} bet multiplier and less than {upperLimit} bet multiplier, you’ll be awarded {points} points.
rule.pointsPerWinBetweenRangeNotInclusiv: On a minimum win higher than {limit} bet and less than {upperLimit} bet multiplier, you’ll be awarded {points} points
rule.perBet: The bet amount is converted to points, 1 point per EUR cent or currency equivalent.
rule.perWin: The win amount is converted to points, 1 point per EUR cent or currency equivalent.
appInfo: Climb the tournament leaderboard for your chance to collect points and win awesome prizes. You must opt in to play - and the better your rank, the better your prize!
appSubTitle: There are games to be played and rewards to be won.
appPrizesTitle: Get spinning for your chance to win one of the top prizes:
dropInfoPick: Choose a Crystal to Reveal Your Prize
dropSubtitle: Look Out! Cash Drops are Coming Your Way
dropInfo: Playing for Cash Drops couldn’t be easier, start spinning on one of the participating games and wait for wins to drop into your balance. Good Luck!
dropNoteStart: The Cash Drop is starting now, good luck!
dropNoteEndSoon: Hurry, the Cash Drop is ending, don’t miss out!
dropNoteBet: Your bet is below the qualifying amount of {value}.
dropNoteCancel: This Cash Drop campaign has been canceled.
dropNoteWin: Someone has just won {value} in the Cash Drop, could you be next?
dropRulesMain: Opt-in and play one of the qualifying games to get a chance for a cash prize. Any spin can trigger a reward.
dropRulesBet: Minimum qualifying bet for this campaign is: {value}
dropTerms.tournamentTime: The campaign (“Campaign”) is organised by Relax Gaming Group and runs between {startdatetime} UTC and {enddatetime} UTC. The online gaming operator operating this website will be referred to as the “Operator” in these Campaign Rules. The Qualifying Games in the Campaign (as defined below) are developed and/or licensed to the Operator by Relax.
dropTerms.participationTerms: The participation in the Campaign is free, but the Player is required to opt-in to the Campaign in one of the Qualifying Games.
dropTerms.acceptanceOfTerms: By opting into the Campaign, the player agrees to be bound by these terms and conditions.
dropTerms.generalRules: Any qualifying spin during the Campaign Period can trigger a prize. Single spin can trigger only one prize. Gameplay from all devices during the Campaign Period may trigger a prize. Any remaining prizes not won during the Campaign Period can be distributed up to 5 minutes after the end of the Campaign Period.
dropTerms.allDevicesTerms: Gameplay from all devices can trigger a reward.
dropTerms.gameplayTimeframe: Only gameplay between the start and end time can trigger a reward. Any remaining prizes can be distributed up to 5 minutes after the campaign end time.
dropTerms.participatingGames: The games qualifying for this campaign are: {GAMES}
dropTerms.noMaxWins: Player is eligible to multiple rewards per campaign.
dropTerms.maxWins: Player is eligible to maximum {value} rewards per promotion occurrence.
dropTerms.minBetSet: The minimum bet to participate in the Campaign is {minbet}, or the closest rounded value if such bet size is not configured for the applicable Qualifying Game, or equivalent in the Player's local currency.
dropTerms.noMinBetSet: There is no minimum bet required for the Player to be able to opt-in.
dropTerms.prizesUpdate: The list of remaining prizes can take up to 10 seconds to update.
dropTerms.automaticFulfillment: The prizes will be automatically awarded once accepted by player. Unclaimed prizes will be paid out within one hour after campaign ends.
dropTerms.manualFulfillment: The prizes will be manually awarded by the organiser of the promotion.
dropTerms.partialAutomaticFulfillment: The following prizes, or equivalent in the Player's local currency, will be automatically awarded once accepted by the Player. Any unclaimed prizes will be paid out within one hour after the Campaign ends: {PRIZES}
dropTerms.partialManualFulfillment: The following prizes, or equivalent in the Player's local currency, will be manually awarded by the Organiser: {PRIZES}
dropTerms.prizesInOverview: The prizes for the Campaign are displayed in the Overview section in the Player’s local currency. The list of remaining prizes not yet won during the Campaign Period can take up to 10 seconds to update. The amounts are exchanged from Euro to the Player’s local currency by using fixed conversion rates. The conversion rate is determined by Relax and is guided by the average annual exchange rates and reviewed periodically.

dropTerms.englishTermPresedence: In the event of a discrepancy between the English version of these Campaign Rules and any other language, the English version prevails.
dropTerms.rightToCancel: The Organiser reserves the right to update these Campaign Rules at any time. The operator reserves the right to cancel the campaign at any point.

Where Relax Gaming does not act as the Organiser of the Campaign, it has nevertheless the right to do the same.

dropTerms.operatorResponsibility: The operator and the website on which the player's account is held are the sole responsible entities to ensure that the promotion complies with local laws and the terms of the promotion, including any changes thereof, shall be communicated in a timely and transparent manner.
dropTerms.freeRoundExemptions: Free Rounds, Feature Triggers and Bonus Rounds (including bonus buys or feature buys or any other such features) are considered part of the original round.
